stories.title: The NBA playoffs' second round is waiting on three...
stories.summary: Not one, not two, but three Game 7s -- all in the East. Here are the keys to the 76ers-Celtics, Magic-Pistons and Raptors-Cavs.

stories.title: West playoff takeaways: Lakers close out series ag...
stories.summary: Here's what has stood out from the latest playoff games of the Western Conference's first round.

stories.title: Kentucky Derby at 19 horses with The Puma out
stories.summary: The Puma has been scratched from the Kentucky Derby, so the 152nd edition of the race will be run Saturday with 19 horses instead of the maximum 20.

stories.title: 'A little too far': McAvoy tossed for violent slas...
stories.summary: Bruins defenseman Charlie McAvoy was ejected late in their Game 6 elimination loss to the Sabres for a violent slash on forward Zach Benson.

stories.title: Lakers blow out Rockets, advance to face Thunder
stories.summary: LeBron James took time to enjoy the Lakers' series-clinching win over the Rockets on Friday night, saying the moments are still special, especially because he doesn't know how many more seasons he has left in his career.
